climate-temperature-chart.png.alt_text: Timeseries of global warming from 1880 to 2020 compared to simulated temperatures given only natural forcing. The first shows a positive trend since around 1950 and the second stays relatively flat.
climate-temperature-chart.png.author: Efbrazil (Wikimedia Commons), data from NASA GISS
climate-temperature-chart.png.caption: Earth's average surface air temperature has increased about 1.5 C (2.7 F) since the Industrial Revolution. Natural forces cause some variability, but the persistent temperature increase shows the progressive influence of human activity.

tour-eiffel.jpg.alt_text: Le Champ-de-Mars au premier plan, la tour Eiffel au deuxieme, puis le palais de Chaillot au troisieme plan.
tour-eiffel.jpg.author: Benh LIEU SONG (Wikimedia Commons)
tour-eiffel.jpg.caption: Le Champ-de-Mars au premier plan, la tour Eiffel au deuxieme, puis le palais de Chaillot au troisieme plan.

wikipedia-logo.png.alt_text: An incomplete sphere made of large, white jigsaw puzzle pieces. Each puzzle piece contains one glyph from a different writing system, with each glyph written in black.
wikipedia-logo.png.author: Nohat (concept by Paullusmagnus); Wikimedia Foundation
wikipedia-logo.png.caption: The logo of Wikipedia, a globe made out of puzzle pieces featuring glyphs from various writing systems
